news.headline: Korean Air installs Komy's aircraft mirrors in galley kitchens of their 158 aircraft fleet. HQ: Kawaguchi, Japan.
news.summary: In Kawaguchi, Japan on December 4, 2024, Korean Air, a prominent South Korean airline headquartered in Seoul, has incorporated mirrors from Komy Co., Ltd. based in Kawaguchi, Saitama Prefecture, just north of Tokyo, into the galley kitchens of all 158 aircraft in its fleet.

news.headline: Global study warns about the threat of generative AI on creators' future, with potential revenue loss of 24% in music and 21% in audiovisual by 2028. Market for Gen AI content to hit €64 billion by 2028.
news.summary: It is crucial for policy makers to protect the rights of creators and enforce transparency regulations. By 2028, creators could face a potential revenue loss of 24% in the music sector and 21% in audiovisual content. The current market for Gen AI music and audiovisual content, valued at €3 billion, is projected to soar to €64 billion by 2028. Consequently, revenues of Gen AI creators are expected to significantly increase within the specified period.

news.headline: Air France-KLM partners with Google Cloud to enhance data and AI strategy with tools and expertise. Announced on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: An airline conglomerate is enhancing its data capabilities and preparing its AI and generative AI systems for launch by partnering with Google Cloud. The collaboration, announced on December 4, 2024 in Sunnyvale, California and Paris, will leverage Google Cloud's data, analytics, and AI tools. This cooperation will provide the global airline group with advanced technological expertise as it looks to improve its operations.

news.headline: YES releases VertaCure XP G3 Systems for Advanced Packaging Applications, Fremont, Calif., Dec. 4, 2024. Leading manufacturer of process equipment for AI and HPC.
news.summary: Today, YES revealed the launch of its latest VertaCure curing systems, designed for producing advanced packaging solutions. The company, headquartered in Fremont, California, made the announcement on December 4, 2024. YES specializes in manufacturing process equipment tailored for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and High Performance Computing (HPC) industries. The 3rd generation VertaCure systems are set to enhance manufacturing capabilities in these sectors.

news.headline: "Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE: GOTU) reveals Q3 2024 unaudited financial results in Beijing, showing strong performance."
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE: GOTU) unveiled its unaudited financial results for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. Gaotu, a prominent online large-class tutoring service provider in China, disclosed the financial performance of the said period. The figures presented in the report shed light on the company's earnings, investments, and overall performance during this quarter.

news.headline: VSMC breaks ground on 300mm Fab in Singapore, production to start in 2027 with 55,000 wafers per month in 2029.
news.summary: Production is set to begin in 2027, with an anticipated production volume of 55,000 300mm wafers per month projected for 2029.

news.headline: Valneva SE published an article in BMJ on global health & economic burden of chikungunya. Dec 4, 2024. #VALN #VLA.
news.summary: In Saint-Herblain, France on December 4, 2024, Valneva SE (Nasdaq: VALN; Euronext Paris: VLA), a company specializing in vaccines, has revealed the release of a report in The British Medical Journal (BMJ) detailing the widespread impact of the mosquito-transmitted disease chikungunya on global health and economies. The article sheds light on the significant challenges posed by chikungunya, emphasizing its importance in one of the top medical journals globally.

news.headline: FSA maintains Bigbank AS's Pillar 2 capital requirements unchanged beyond 2025 post SREP evaluation.
news.summary: In December 2024, Bigbank AS received the results of the annual Supervisory Review and Evaluation Process (SREP) capital adequacy calculation from the Financial Supervision Authority (FSA). Following the evaluation, the FSA opted to maintain the Pillar 2 capital requirements unchanged for Bigbank AS.

news.headline: Second phase of Share Buyback Program initiated by Syensqo.
Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. will release Q3 2024 financial results and operational progress on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. is scheduled to announce its third-quarter financial results and operational accomplishments for the year 2024. This update will provide insight into the company's performance during this period, including key financial figures and advancements made in their operations. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate learning about the progress and growth of Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. in the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Construction contract signed in Lithuania on Dec 3, 2024, to build foundations for 3 wind turbines and related infrastructure.
news.summary: UAB Merko Statyba, which is affiliated with the AS Merko Ehitus group, along with UAB PSVL SUN and UAB PSVL WIND, signed an agreement on December 3, 2024, to undertake the construction of foundations for three wind turbines in a windfarm situated in the Pasvalys district, Lithuania. The project also includes the development of associated infrastructure such as electrical cables and roads.

news.headline: Palliser Capital urges Rio Tinto to unify dual listing on LSE and ASX into an Australian holding company.
news.summary: London-based investor Palliser Capital has a substantial economic stake in Rio Tinto Plc (LSE: RIO) and Rio Tinto Limited (ASX: RIO). They have urged the Rio Tinto Board of Directors to consider merging their dual listed company structure on the London Stock Exchange and Australian Stock Exchange into a sole Australian-based holding company. This move aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency within the company.

news.headline: Rio Tinto plans to invest for a stronger, diversified portfolio in London, aiming for global leadership in energy transition materials, with a decade of profitable growth ahead. CEO aims for long-term shareholder returns.
news.summary: Rio Tinto is hosting its 2024 Investor Seminar in London to share updates on its strategy focusing on strengthening and diversifying the portfolio for long-term growth and improved shareholder returns. The company's Chief Executive, Jakob Stausholm, stated that Rio Tinto is well-equipped to excel in energy transition materials and has a solid roadmap for achieving a decade of profitable expansion. The company is committed to its goal of becoming a key player in sustainable energy materials sector.

news.headline: Safenet plans to create a Visa-like payment network for crypto, linking blockchains and enabling cross-chain transactions for users.
news.summary: Safenet's goal is to serve as a bridge between different blockchain networks, enabling users to access multiple chains using just one account.

news.headline: Adam Gray, Democrat, Wins California House Race: AP
Rio Tinto partners with Vargas, Mitsubishi Corp., others to study low carbon aluminium project in Finland, using AP60 technology.
news.summary: Rio Tinto recently announced a partnership in London to explore a low carbon aluminum project in Finland, joining forces with Swedish investment firm Vargas, Mitsubishi Corporation, and other global and local industry participants. Rio Tinto's role as the key industrial partner in the Arctial partnership involves sharing its advanced AP60 technology for this potential initiative, representing the first deployment of AP60 technology in an aluminum smelter beyond Quebec. The collaboration aims to evaluate a greenfield opportunity for low carbon aluminum production and marks a significant step towards sustainable industrial practices.

news.headline: Rio Tinto, Vargas, and Other Companies to Study Aluminum Project in Finland
Iran is open to sending troops to Syria if called upon by Assad, reports Bloomberg.

Global automotive ECU market recovered post COVID-19, driven by electric vehicle adoption. Technological advancements and regulatory demands fuel market growth. APAC, North America, and Europe show strong growth. EV market to grow at 15-20% CAGR. Integration with smartphones & real-time data is a rising trend in the automotive sector.
news.summary: The automotive Electronic Control Unit (ECU) market faced a slowdown during the pandemic but is now rebounding due to the increasing adoption of electric vehicles worldwide. Innovations in autonomous driving technologies are driving market expansion, with a focus on safety and convenience features. Government regulations promoting fuel efficiency are also contributing to the growth of ECUs in vehicles. The global electric vehicle market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 15%-20%, further boosting the demand for advanced ECUs. Asia-Pacific is anticipated to witness the highest growth in the ECU market, followed by North America and Europe. The integration of vehicles with smartphones for real-time data monitoring is also a key trend driving the demand for advanced ECU systems.

news.headline: Experts in various fields meet in Beijing to review research reports on agriculture and animal husbandry sustainability.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Beijing, a group of experts specializing in rural development, rural economy, green development, and representatives from the Chinese dairy company, Mengniu Group, gathered to discuss the findings of a research project. The meeting aimed to evaluate the impact of various practices and policies on effectively combining strategies related to rural development. This collaboration brought together professionals from different sectors to analyze the outcomes and implications of the study, emphasizing the importance of implementing efficient measures for sustainable growth.

news.headline: indie Semiconductor priced $190M in 3.50% Convertible Senior Notes. Offering upsized from original plan.
news.summary: In Aliso Viejo, California, indie Semiconductor, Inc. ("indie" or "we") (NASDAQ: INDI) revealed the pricing of its private offering involving $190 million aggregate principal amount of its 3.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2029 (the “notes”). The offering, which was aimed at qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, saw an increase in size from the initial plans.

news.headline: Xin Yi orchestra promotes Chinese folk music at Yangtze River Delta Expo in Shanghai, attracting global audience.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 4, 2024, the Yangtze River Delta International Cultural Industries Expo in Shanghai featured the Xin Yi Chinese Traditional Chamber Orchestra at the Minhang District exhibition hall. The orchestra showcased a mesmerizing collection of Chinese folk music to the audience, delivering a cultural experience like never before.

news.headline: South Korean Parties to Submit Impeachment Proposal at 2:40pm: Yonhap
Peking University HSBC Business School in Shenzhen reaccredited by AACSB for 5 years in 2024.
news.summary: In December 2024, Peking University HSBC Business School (PHBS) in Shenzhen, China, received accreditation from the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB) for a full 5-year term. This marks the continuation of their accreditation status, which was confirmed in November 2024. The AACSB peer review team granted this accreditation, underscoring PHBS's commitment to maintaining high standards in business education. This achievement highlights PHBS as a reputable institution, and signifies its dedication to providing quality education in the field.

news.headline: Akeso presents Cadonilimab combo therapy for PD-(L)1 resistant NSCLC at 2024 Asian Lung Cancer Conference.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Akeso, Inc. shared findings from a phase Ib/II clinical trial (AK104-IIT-018) of cadonilimab for patients with advanced conditions. The study involved a sample of patients from multiple centers and was open-label and single-arm. Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) released these results. Cadonilimab, a PD-1/CTLA-4 bispecific antibody, was the focus of the trial.

news.headline: Hut 8 fights back against shareholder lawsuit claiming it's motivated by a short seller looking to profit on its short position in the crypto miner.
news.summary: Hut 8 is facing a lawsuit initiated by its shareholders due to allegations that it is a result of a short seller's efforts to profit from its short position in the cryptocurrency mining company.

news.headline: Faraday Future appoints Dr. Lei Gu as President of FX Global EV R&D Center. Dr. Gu, automotive expert, will lead development of the FX 6.
news.summary: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. has revealed that Dr. Lei Gu, well-known in China's automotive sector for his expertise in vehicle development and safety technology, will assume roles in the company as the President of FX Global EV Research and Development Center and Vehicle Line Executive for the FX 6. Faraday Future, a California-based global intelligent electric mobility ecosystem firm trading on Nasdaq under the symbol FFIE, shared this news today. Dr. Gu's appointment signifies the company's focus on strengthening its position in the electric vehicle market.

news.headline: e.l.f. Beauty to debut new Show Your(s)e.l.f. episode with Viktoria Modesta at Tribeca Festival, showcasing self-expression.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF) has announced the release of a new episode in its Show Your(s)e.l.f. film series, showcasing bionic pop artist Viktoria Modesta. The episode premieres on Dec. 5 at the Tribeca Festival in Art Basel Miami Beach. This event signifies a significant step in e.l.f.'s mission to promote self-expression, inclusivity, and resilience. The collaboration between e.l.f. and Tribeca Festival highlights the potential at the intersection of art and beauty.

news.headline: Bundesbank leader urges relaxation of expenditure regulations: FT
Covenant Logistics Group awarded Safety Program of the Year by Rand McNally; Marshall Rushworth named Safety Leader of the Year.
news.summary: A company has been recognized as the Rand McNally Safety Program of the Year for their exceptional commitment to fleet safety. The company's efforts were also acknowledged through Marshall Rushworth, who received the Safety Leader of the Year award for his transformative leadership in enhancing safety measures within the fleet. The awards highlight the company's dedication to maintaining the highest safety standards and Marshall Rushworth's significant contribution in leading these efforts. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to ensuring a safe environment, with Marshall Rushworth's leadership being a key factor in achieving this.

news.headline: Lumina partners with Indeed for video content, survey finds 70% of jobseekers prefer visual job postings.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon on December 4, 2024, Lumina, a top provider of Visual Job Postings in the recruitment sector, has revealed a significant collaboration with Indeed. Lumina's surveys highlight a notable trend in the industry - an increasing preference for Branded Video Content, with 70% of job seekers showing interest. This partnership is set to reshape the recruitment landscape, demonstrating a shift towards more visual and engaging job-seeking experiences.

news.headline: Seeing Machines releases alarming trends in driver fatigue and distraction: 11.6M risky events, 600K phone use cases, 51 fatigue & 5 distracted driving incidents per hour.
news.summary: In the past year, a total of 11.6 million dangerous driving incidents were documented over a span of 3.6 billion kilometers. There were over 600,000 cases of drivers using mobile devices while on the road. On average, the Guardian system identified around 51 instances of fatigue per hour and over 5 occurrences of distracted driving every hour.

news.headline: Bangladesh's economy suffered losses due to bank looting under the previous PM, draining the currency.
news.summary: The currency of Bangladesh faced significant devaluation due to alleged embezzlement in the banks during the tenure of the recently removed prime minister. New estimates provided by the central bank indicate substantial losses suffered as a result of these actions.

news.headline: Burning Rock Biotech reported Q3 2024 financial results, with RMB128.6 million (US$18.3 million) total revenue, showing a 0.8% increase from the same period in 2023. The company saw significant growth in in-hospital business revenue to RMB63.8 million (US$9.1 million), a 17.0% increase. However, central laboratory business revenue decreased to RMB40.0 million (US$5.7 million), a 25.2% drop. The net loss for the quarter was RMB35.7 million (US$5.10 million). Burning Rock focuses on next-generation sequencing in precision oncology.
news.summary: Burning Rock Biotech Limited reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, with total revenues of RMB128.6 million (US$18.3 million), a 0.8% increase from the same period in 2023. Revenue from in-hospital business increased by 17.0% to RMB63.8 million, while revenue from central lab business decreased by 25.2% to RMB40.0 million. Gross profit was RMB91.8 million, with a gross margin of 71.4%. Operating expenses decreased by 50.7%, resulting in a net loss of RMB35.7 million for the quarter. The company had cash and investments worth RMB498.2 million (US$71.0 million). Burning Rock focuses on precision oncology and partnering with hospitals and pharma companies for NGS-based testing and research. The company also announced strategic collaborations and key milestones in therapy selection.

news.headline: Intuitive Machines priced upsized $110.0M offering of 9,523,810 shares at $10.50/share, with additional shares available.
news.summary: Intuitive Machines, Inc. has disclosed that they are pricing an increased offering of 9,523,810 shares of their Class A common stock at $10.50 per share. This offering is being conducted on the Nasdaq exchange under the tickers LUNR and LUNRW, with the company granting underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 1,275,714 and 152,857 shares from the Company and a selling stockholder respectively. The Offering is anticipated to conclude on December 5, 2024, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

news.headline: China Coast Guard: Responds to Collision with Philippine Ship
China urges Philippines to stop provocation immediately

Bitcoin and Ethereum dropped in South Korea, with Bitcoin hitting $71,800 on Upbit during political turmoil. Ethereum dropped to $2,700 on Upbit while trading over $3,600 on Coinbase. Korea Premium Index plummeted to -14.67, indicating retail investors selling at lower prices.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies were selling at discounted rates on South Korea's Upbit exchange due to political turmoil in the country. Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) experienced significant drops in value, with BTC falling to $71,800 compared to around $95,500 on Coinbase, a U.S. exchange. Similarly, ETH dropped to $2,700 on Upbit while trading at over $3,600 on Coinbase. The Korea Premium Index, indicating the difference between Korean exchange prices and other markets, fell to -14.67, suggesting that retail investors were selling at lower rates. This situation occurred as President Yoon Suk Yeol declared martial law in South Korea.

news.headline: Large Bitcoin holders adopt a 'wait-and-see approach' as price stabilizes around $96,000, with notable inflows to exchanges.
news.summary: A prominent cryptocurrency analyst has pointed out that there has been a notable increase in Bitcoin deposits to cryptocurrency exchanges by large holders, commonly known as whales. These whales, however, appear to be refraining from making any significant transactions or movements with their holdings at the moment.

news.headline: Global Times interviewed Maria João Rodrigues on China-Europe relations at the 2024 Understanding China Conference in Guangzhou.
news.summary: The 2024 Understanding China Conference is taking place in Guangzhou, the capital of Guangdong Province in South China, from Monday to Wednesday. This conference aims to shed light on the importance of comprehending China in today's global landscape. With tensions escalating between Europe and China, it is crucial for Europe to grasp a deeper understanding of China's culture, politics, and economy, especially amidst the current global uncertainties. Through this conference, experts and policymakers will discuss strategies for enhancing mutual understanding and cooperation between Europe and China.

news.headline: VAPORESSO in China launches Global ECO-Empowerment Initiative - PURE POWER FOR ALL to promote sustainability in vaping.
news.summary: In December 2024, VAPORESSO, a leading company in the vaping sector based in Shenzhen, China, reaffirmed its dedication to sustainability with the introduction of its Global ECO-Empowerment Initiative – PURE POWER FOR ALL. This initiative aims to...

news.headline: Yen falls 0.3% against dollar, trading at 150.08
South Korean Prime Minister Han Duck-soo cited by Yonhap News
bauma CHINA 2024: SANY presents at Expo Centre with 3,500 exhibitors, emphasizing new quality development and innovation.
news.summary: The current event at Shanghai New International Expo Centre, bauma CHINA 2024, has attracted more than 3,500 exhibitors globally. With the theme "Leading the Industry with New Quality Development," SANY is highlighting its dedication to innovation and advancement in the industry.

news.headline: South Korea Premier Han Feels Responsible for Every Step: Yonhap.
South Korean premier pledges to serve citizens until the end: Yonhap
Japan to relax visa regulations for Chinese tourists: Nikkei

Bank of America's economics team shared 10 insights on the US economy, tackling pressing questions like food prices and deflation. Groceries remain expensive despite inflation decline. Deflation is unlikely due to economic challenges post-pandemic, with income growth crucial. No recession despite Fed rate hikes due to strong real income growth.
news.summary: Bank of America's economics team, led by Aditya Bhave, addressed 10 pressing economic questions on Thanksgiving, offering insights on issues like high food prices and the soaring deficit. Despite inflation slowing down, food prices remain elevated. While groceries rose by 1.2% in the past year, they are still above 2019 levels. Reverting to 2019 prices would require deflation, a sign of economic malaise. Bank of America suggests focusing on income growth and productivity instead. The U.S. economy has surprisingly avoided a recession, with real income growth outpacing inflation. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump moves quickly with Cabinet picks but faces resistance with Treasury Department.
news.summary: Donald Trump has swiftly selected his top Cabinet members, but is encountering opposition for his approach in appointing key positions, particularly at the Treasury Department.

news.headline: China central bank injects 41.3 billion yuan via 7-day reverse repos at 1.50%: statement
